news.title: Apple drops commission rates in China without a fuss
news.summary: Apple dropped its App Store commission rates to 25% in China, and commissions on auto-renewed subscriptions down to 12%.

news.title: Adobe will pay $75 million to settle US cancellation fee lawsuit
